scripts.pregenerate-icons: rm -rf src/Icon && rm -rf src/optimized-svg && rm -rf dist && svgo -f ./svg/Icon -o src/optimized-svg/Icon && mkdir -p src/Icon
scripts.postgenerate-icons: idxgen src/Icon/ && replace '@chakra-ui/react' '@chakra-ui/react/icon' src/Icon/*.tsx && replace '#000000' 'currentColor' src/Icon/*.tsx && replace '#000' 'currentColor' src/Icon/*.tsx && replace 'blockProgression' 'msBlockProgression' src/Icon/*.tsx && replace '(shapePadding|solidColor|solidOpacity): .*$' '' src/Icon/*.tsx  && replace '<Icon' '<Icon as="svg" width="1em" height="1em" fill="currentColor"' src/Icon/*.tsx && rm -rf src/optimized-svg
